name: TLPCLOSEUPDSH
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[TLPCLOSEUPDSH] ON [dbo].[TALEPHAREKETLERI]
FOR UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @TD_REF AS INT
DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
SELECT D.TD_REF FROM DELETED D,INSERTED I WHERE I.TD_REF=D.TD_REF AND I.STATUS=1 AND D.STATUS=0  GROUP BY D.TD_REF
OPEN Dcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
INTO @TD_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE STATUS=0 AND TD_REF=@TD_REF
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
INTO @TD_REF;
END  
CLOSE Dcur;  
DEALLOCATE Dcur;
